author: LinOnetwo
description: A gallery plugin with masonry/waterfall layout, lightbox expand, hover toolbar and inline tag editor.
name: Gallery
text:
{"tiddlers":{"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/macros/gallery":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/macros/gallery","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","tags":"$:/tags/Macro","text":"\procedure gallery(filter:"", tag:"", columns:"", order:"horizontal") <$let columnCount={{{ [trim[]compare:number:gt[0]thenelse[3]trunc[]max[1]] }}}> <$let itemOrder={{{ [trim[]lowercase[]match[vertical]then[vertical]else[horizontal]] }}}> <% if [!is[blank]] %> <$macrocall $name="gallery-grid" useFilter="yes" itemFilter=<> tagName="" columnCount=<> itemOrder=<> /> <% elseif [!is[blank]] %> <$macrocall $name="gallery-grid" useFilter="no" itemFilter="" tagName=<> columnCount=<> itemOrder=<> /> <% else %> <$macrocall $name="gallery-grid" useFilter="no" itemFilter="" tagName=<> columnCount=<> itemOrder=<> /> <% endif %> \end gallery \procedure gallery-grid(useFilter:"no", itemFilter:"", tagName:"", columnCount:"3", itemOrder:"horizontal") <$let galleryStateBase={{{ [[$:/state/gallery/]addsuffix] }}} expandState={{{ [addsuffix[/expanded]] }}} itemExpanded={{{ [get[text]] }}} >
!is[blank]then[lno-gallery-container lno-gallery-container--single]] ~[match[vertical]then[lno-gallery-container lno-gallery-container--vertical]] ~[[lno-gallery-container]] }}} style={{{ [addprefix[--lno-gallery-columns:]addsuffix[;]] }}}> <% if [!is[blank]] %> <$macrocall $name="gallery-grid-items" useFilter=<> itemFilter=<> tagName=<> stateBase=<> itemExpanded=<> /> <% elseif [match[vertical]] %> <$macrocall $name="gallery-grid-items" useFilter=<> itemFilter=<> tagName=<> stateBase=<> itemExpanded=<> /> <% else %> <$list filter="[range[1],]" variable="galleryColumn"> <$let columnRemainder={{{ [subtract[1]] }}}>
<$macrocall $name="gallery-grid-column-items" useFilter=<> itemFilter=<> tagName=<> stateBase=<> itemExpanded=<> columnCount=<> columnRemainder=<> />
<% endif %>
\end gallery-grid \procedure gallery-grid-items(useFilter:"no", itemFilter:"", tagName:"", stateBase:"", itemExpanded:"") <% if [match[yes]] %> <$list filter=<> variable="galleryItem"> <$macrocall $name="gallery-item" item=<> stateBase=<> itemExpanded=<> /> <% else %> <$list filter="[tag]" variable="galleryItem"> <$macrocall $name="gallery-item" item=<> stateBase=<> itemExpanded=<> /> <% endif %> \end gallery-grid-items \procedure gallery-grid-column-items(useFilter:"no", itemFilter:"", tagName:"", stateBase:"", itemExpanded:"", columnCount:"3", columnRemainder:"0") <% if [match[yes]] %> <$list filter=<> variable="galleryItem" counter="galleryItemCounter"> <$list filter="[subtract[1]remaindermatch]" variable="ignore"> <$macrocall $name="gallery-item" item=<> stateBase=<> itemExpanded=<> /> <% else %> <$list filter="[tag]" variable="galleryItem" counter="galleryItemCounter"> <$list filter="[subtract[1]remaindermatch]" variable="ignore"> <$macrocall $name="gallery-item" item=<> stateBase=<> itemExpanded=<> /> <% endif %> \end gallery-grid-column-items \procedure gallery-item(item:"", stateBase:"", itemExpanded:"") <$let expandState={{{ [addsuffix[/expanded]] }}} >
is[blank]then[lno-gallery-item]] ~[matchthen[lno-gallery-item lno-gallery-item--expanded]] ~[[lno-gallery-item lno-gallery-item--hidden]] }}}> <$button class="lno-gallery-item-click-target tc-btn-invisible" actions=""" <$list filter="[match]" variable="ignore"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="" /> <$list filter="[!match]" variable="ignore"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text=<> /> """> <$list filter="[is[image]]" variable="ignore"> <$image source=<> class="lno-gallery-img" /> <$list filter="[!is[image]]" variable="ignore"> <$list filter="[has[_canonical_uri]]" variable="ignore"> <$image source=<> class="lno-gallery-img" /> <$list filter="[!has[_canonical_uri]]" variable="ignore">
<$transclude $tiddler=<> $mode="block" />
<$button class="lno-gallery-btn tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="Open" actions="""<$action-navigate $to=<> />"""> {{$:/core/images/right-arrow}} <$let tagEditState={{{ [[$:/state/gallery/tag-edit/]addsuffix] }}} tagInputTiddler={{{ [[$:/state/gallery/tag-input/]addsuffix] }}} > <$button class="lno-gallery-btn tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="Edit tags" actions="""<$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text={{{ [get[text]match[open]then[closed]] ~[[open]] }}} />"""> {{$:/core/images/tag-button}} <$reveal type="match" state=<> text="open">
<$list filter="[tags[]]" variable="thisTag"> <$text text=<> /><$button class="lno-gallery-tag-remove tc-btn-invisible" tooltip="Remove tag" actions="""<$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="tags" $subfilter="-[]" />""">× <$edit-text tiddler=<> field="text" tag="input" type="search" placeholder="Add tag..." class="lno-gallery-tag-input" default="" /> <$button class="lno-gallery-tag-add-btn" actions=""" <$let newTag={{{ [get[text]] }}}> <$list filter="[!is[blank]]" variable="ignore"> <$action-listops $tiddler=<> $field="tags" $subfilter="+[append]" /> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="" /> """>Add
\end gallery-item "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/readme","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"! Gallery Plugin A compact gallery plugin for image/content browsing. !! Features * `<>` macro with masonry layout ** `filter` parameter: use any TW filter ** `tag` parameter: list tiddlers tagged with the given tag ** `columns` parameter: set how many columns to render, default is `3` ** `order` parameter: use `horizontal` for row-first placement, or `vertical` to keep the old column-first placement ** no params: uses `currentTiddler` as tag * Click image to toggle modes: ** gallery mode (all items) ** single-image mode (focused item only) * Hover toolbar per item: ** Open in story river ** Inline tag edit * Story template integration via `$:/tags/StoryTiddlerTemplateFilter` ** Add tag `$:/tags/gallery` to a tiddler to use gallery-first view ** Default parts are collapsed and use core fold/unfold banner style !! Usage ```wikitext <> <> <> <> <> ``` !! Try out drag some image import, and use `<>` to load them (Better to use .webp, it works better than jpg in modern browser) "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/styles/gallery.css":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/styles/gallery.css","text":".lno-gallery-container{--lno-gallery-columns:3;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(var(--lno-gallery-columns),minmax(0,1fr));gap:4px;align-items:start;padding:0}.lno-gallery-column{min-width:0}.lno-gallery-container--vertical{display:block;column-count:var(--lno-gallery-columns);column-gap:4px}.lno-gallery-item{break-inside:avoid;position:relative;margin-bottom:4px;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;background:var(--tiddler-background-color,#fff);box-shadow:0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.12);cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow .2s,transform .2s}.lno-gallery-item:hover{box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.2);z-index:2}.lno-gallery-item--expanded{column-span:all;z-index:10;box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.22);transform:none}.lno-gallery-item--hidden{display:none}.lno-gallery-container--single{display:block}.lno-gallery-container--single .lno-gallery-item--expanded{max-width:min(960px,100%);margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;margin-bottom:0}.lno-gallery-item-click-target{display:block;width:100%;padding:0;margin:0;border:none;background:0 0;cursor:pointer;text-align:left}.lno-gallery-img{display:block;width:100%;height:auto;object-fit:cover}.lno-gallery-item--expanded .lno-gallery-img{max-height:80vh;width:auto;max-width:100%;margin:0 auto;display:block}.lno-gallery-text-content{padding:8px 10px;font-size:.9em;max-height:200px;overflow:hidden}.lno-gallery-item--expanded .lno-gallery-text-content{max-height:none;overflow:visible}.lno-gallery-toolbar{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;padding:2px 4px;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(0,0,0,.55),transparent);opacity:0;transition:opacity .18s;pointer-events:none;z-index:5}.lno-gallery-item--expanded .lno-gallery-toolbar,.lno-gallery-item:hover .lno-gallery-toolbar{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto}.lno-gallery-btn{color:#fff!important;padding:2px 4px!important;border-radius:3px;line-height:1;background:0 0!important;border:none!important;cursor:pointer;transition:background .15s}.lno-gallery-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.25)!important}.lno-gallery-btn svg{fill:#fff;width:1em;height:1em;vertical-align:middle}.lno-gallery-tag-editor{position:absolute;bottom:36px;left:0;right:0;background:var(--tiddler-background-color,#fff);border:1px solid var(--tiddler-border-color,#ccc);border-radius:6px;padding:8px;z-index:20;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.18);display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;align-items:center}.lno-gallery-tag-pill{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;background:var(--tag-background,#e8e8e8);color:var(--tag-foreground,#333);border-radius:20px;padding:2px 8px 2px 10px;font-size:.82em}.lno-gallery-tag-remove{color:inherit!important;font-size:1em;padding:0 2px!important;line-height:1}.lno-gallery-tag-input{flex:1;min-width:80px;border:1px solid var(--tiddler-border-color,#ccc);border-radius:4px;padding:3px 6px;font-size:.85em}.lno-gallery-tag-suggestion{display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;padding:2px 8px;border:none;background:0 0;cursor:pointer;font-size:.85em;color:var(--primary-color,#5778d8)}.lno-gallery-tag-suggestion:hover{background:var(--muted-foreground,#f0f0f0)}.lno-gallery-tag-add-btn{background:var(--primary-color,#5778d8)!important;color:#fff!important;border:none;border-radius:4px;padding:2px 8px;font-size:.82em;cursor:pointer}.lno-gallery-tiddler-view{padding:0!important}.lno-gallery-story-frame{padding:4px 6px 6px!important}.lno-gallery-story-frame .tc-tiddler-title{margin-bottom:2px}.lno-gallery-story-frame .tc-titlebar{padding-bottom:0}.lno-gallery-core-content{padding:0 2px 4px}","tags":"$:/tags/Stylesheet","type":"text/css"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/tree":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/tree","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"<>"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/view-template/cascade":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/view-template/cascade","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","tags":"$:/tags/StoryTiddlerTemplateFilter","list-before":"$:/config/StoryTiddlerTemplateFilters/default","caption":"Gallery View Template","text":"[tag[$:/tags/gallery]then[$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/view-template/story]] "},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/view-template/story":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery/view-template/story","type":"text/vnd.tiddlywiki","text":"\whitespace trim \define folded-state() $:/state/folded/$(currentTiddler)$ \end <$let storyTitle={{{ [<..currentTiddler>!is[blank]else] }}}> <$tiddler tiddler=<>>
> data-tags={{!!tags}} class="tc-tiddler-frame tc-tiddler-view-frame lno-gallery-story-frame" role="article"> <$transclude tiddler="$:/core/ui/ViewTemplate/title" />
<>
<$reveal tag="div" type="match" stateTitle=<> text="hide" default="hide" retain="yes" animate="yes"> <$button tooltip={{$:/language/Buttons/Unfold/Hint}} aria-label={{$:/language/Buttons/Unfold/Caption}} class="tc-unfold-banner"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="show"/> {{$:/core/images/chevron-down}} <$reveal tag="div" type="nomatch" stateTitle=<> text="hide" default="hide" retain="yes" animate="yes"> <$button tooltip={{$:/language/Buttons/Fold/Hint}} aria-label={{$:/language/Buttons/Fold/Caption}} class="tc-fold-banner"> <$action-setfield $tiddler=<> text="hide"/> {{$:/core/images/chevron-up}}
<$reveal tag="div" class="lno-gallery-core-content" type="nomatch" stateTitle=<> text="hide" default="hide" retain="yes" animate="yes"> <$transclude tiddler="$:/core/ui/ViewTemplate/subtitle" /> <$transclude tiddler="$:/core/ui/ViewTemplate/body/default" />
"}}}
title: $:/plugins/linonetwo/gallery
